name: HumanitZ
author: engels74@marx.ps, TimoWolle
description: HumanitZ is a co-op, isometric, open world survival game in a world ended by the zombie outbreak. As one of the few human survivors, try to last as long as “humanly” possible. The past can’t be changed, but you can make a difference today for the future of humanity.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/ptero-eggs/installers:debian'

##
#
# Variables
# STEAM_USER, STEAM_PASS, STEAM_AUTH - Steam user setup. If a user has 2fa enabled it will most likely fail due to timeout. Leave blank for anon install.
# WINDOWS_INSTALL - if it's a windows server you want to install set to 1
# SRCDS_APPID - steam app id found here - https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List
# SRCDS_BETAID - beta branch of a steam app. Leave blank to install normal branch
# SRCDS_BETAPASS - password for a beta branch should one be required during private or closed testing phases.. Leave blank for no password.
# INSTALL_FLAGS - Any additional SteamCMD  flags to pass during install.. Keep in mind that steamcmd auto update process in the docker image might overwrite or ignore these when it performs update on server boot.
# AUTO_UPDATE - Adding this variable to the egg allows disabling or enabling automated updates on boot. Boolean value. 0 to disable and 1 to enable.
#
 ##

# Install packages. Default packages below are not required if using our existing install image thus speeding up the install process.
#apt -y update
#apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit 

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## making server files executable
chmod +x /mnt/server/HumanitZServer/Binaries/Linux/HumanitZServer-Linux-Shipping

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: [REQUIRED] Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID of HumanitZ Server

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Enable automatic updates on boot (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: [REQUIRED] Steam Beta Branch
variables.description: This ensures the script will grab the Linux version of the server

variables.name: [REQUIRED] Steam Query Port
variables.description: Port used by Steam to query server information

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server (leave empty for no password)

variables.name: Welcome Message
variables.description: Create a WelcomeMessage.txt
variables.default_value:
Create a WelcomeMessage.txt. Feel free to use the special colors.
When players join your server they will see this welcome message, feel free to add your server rules or whatever you need.
Welcome message is optional.

Example:

Welcome to <SP>Server name</>, enjoy your time.
<PN>Dar red color</>
<PR>Green color</>
<SP>Ember color</>
<FO>Gray color</>
<CL>Blue color</>

variables.name: Save Name
variables.description: Name of the save file for this server

variables.name: Search ID
variables.description: Custom search identifier for grouping servers. Changing from default will hide server from standard server list

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for admin access. Use /adminaccess <password> in-game to gain admin privileges

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server simultaneously

variables.name: RCON Enabled
variables.description: Enable remote console for executing commands via RCON-compatible programs. Also displays server ping in browser (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: RCON Port
variables.description: TCP port for RCON connections

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: Password required for RCON authentication

variables.name: No Death Feedback
variables.description: Disable death notifications for players. Admins can still see them (1 = disabled/not visible, 0 = enabled)

variables.name: No Join Feedback
variables.description: Disable join/leave notifications for players. Admins can still see them (1 = disabled/not visible, 0 = enabled)

variables.name: Limited Spawns
variables.description: Restrict players to random coast spawns and spawn points only (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Save Interval Seconds
variables.description: Interval in seconds between automatic world saves (0 = disabled)

variables.name: Perma Death
variables.description: Players lose their character permanently on death and must create a new one (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: On Death Mode
variables.description: What items are lost on death: 0=Nothing, 1=Backpack+Weapon, 2=Previous+Pockets, 3=Everything

variables.name: Respawn Timer
variables.description: Time in seconds before players can respawn after death

variables.name: PVP
variables.description: Enable player vs player combat and interaction with other players' items (cars, containers, etc.) (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Air Drop
variables.description: Enable air drop events on the server (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Air Drop Interval
variables.description: Number of in-game days between air drop events

variables.name: Weapon Break
variables.description: Weapons break and are removed from inventory when durability reaches 0% (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Max Owned Cars
variables.description: Maximum number of cars a player can own. Unowned cars can be looted but not driven

variables.name: Multiplayer Sleep
variables.description: Allow time to pass when all players use the sleep emote simultaneously (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Loot Respawn
variables.description: Enable loot respawning in the world (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Loot Respawn Timer
variables.description: Time in minutes for loot containers to respawn (requires Loot Respawn enabled)

variables.name: Pickup Respawn Timer
variables.description: Time in minutes for pickup items to respawn (requires Loot Respawn enabled)

variables.name: Rarity Food
variables.description: Food spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Drink
variables.description: Drink spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Melee
variables.description: Melee weapon spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Ranged
variables.description: Ranged weapon spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Ammo
variables.description: Ammunition spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Armor
variables.description: Armor spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Resources
variables.description: Resources spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: Rarity Other
variables.description: Other items spawn rarity: 0=Scarce, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=Plentiful, 4=Abundant

variables.name: ZombieDiffHealth
variables.description: Zombie health difficulty: 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: ZombieDiffSpeed
variables.description: Zombie speed difficulty: 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: ZombieDiffDamage
variables.description: Zombie damage difficulty: 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: ZombieAmountMulti
variables.description: Zombie spawn multiplier (1=Default, 2=Double, 0.5=Half)

variables.name: HumanAmountMulti
variables.description: Human bandit spawn multiplier (1=Default, 2=Double, 0.5=Half)

variables.name: ZombieDogMulti
variables.description: Zombie dog spawn multiplier, mainly appear at night (1=Default, 2=Double, 0.5=Half)

variables.name: ZombieRespawnTimer
variables.description: Time in minutes for zombies to respawn (0 = disabled)

variables.name: HumanRespawnTimer
variables.description: Time in minutes for human bandits to respawn (0 = disabled)

variables.name: HumanHealth
variables.description: Human bandit health difficulty: 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: HumanSpeed
variables.description: Human bandit speed difficulty: 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: HumanDamage
variables.description: Human bandit damage difficulty: 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: AnimalMulti
variables.description: Animal spawn multiplier (1=Default, 2=Double, 0.5=Half)

variables.name: AnimalRespawnTimer
variables.description: Time in minutes for animals to respawn (0 = disabled)

variables.name: StartingSeason
variables.description: Initial season: 0=Summer, 1=Autumn, 2=Winter, 3=Spring

variables.name: DaysPerSeason
variables.description: Number of in-game days per season

variables.name: DayDur
variables.description: Daytime duration in real-time minutes

variables.name: NightDur
variables.description: Nighttime duration in real-time minutes

variables.name: VitalDrain
variables.description: Vital stats drain rate: 0=Slow, 1=Normal, 2=Fast

variables.name: DogEnabled
variables.description: Enable dog companions that can be found and recruited (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: RecruitDog
variables.description: Allow players to recruit companion dogs by dropping food and claiming them (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: DogNum
variables.description: Maximum number of companion dogs spawned in the world (respawn automatically)

variables.name: BuildingHealth
variables.description: Health multiplier for player-placed buildings (1=Default, 2=Double)

variables.name: CompanionHealth
variables.description: Dog companion health level: 0=Low, 1=Default, 2=High

variables.name: CompanionDmg
variables.description: Dog companion damage level: 0=Low, 1=Default, 2=High

variables.name: AllowDismantle
variables.description: Allow players to dismantle their own buildings (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: AllowHouseDismantle
variables.description: Allow players to dismantle house props (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Territory
variables.description: Prevent building in spawn point areas. Clans: only non-recruit members can build (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Decay
variables.description: Number of real-life days for spawn points to decay from 100% to destroyed

variables.name: BuildingDecay
variables.description: Number of real-life days for player buildings to fully decay (0 = disabled)

variables.name: PickupCleanup
variables.description: Number of in-game days until dropped items are automatically destroyed

variables.name: FakeBuildingCleanup
variables.description: Time in minutes until blueprint buildings (white) are automatically destroyed

variables.name: FoodDecay
variables.description: Food decay multiplier: 0=Disabled, 1=Default, 0.5=Half speed, 2=Double speed

variables.name: GenFuel
variables.description: Generator fuel consumption multiplier: 1=Default, 0.5=Half speed, 2=Double speed (range: 0.01-4)

variables.name: Sleep
variables.description: Enable sleep deprivation effects (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: FreezeTime
variables.description: Pause time progression when server is empty (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Voip
variables.description: Enable voice chat (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: AIEvent
variables.description: AI raid event frequency (zombies/bandits attacking): 0=Disabled, 1=Low, 2=Default, 3=High, 4=Insane

variables.name: Weather_ClearSky
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Clear Sky (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_Cloudy
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Cloudy (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_Foggy
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Fog (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_LightRain
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Light Rain (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_Rain
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Rain (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_Thunderstorm
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Thunderstorm (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_LightSnow
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Light Snow (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_Snow
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Snow (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Weather_Blizzard
variables.description: Weather spawn weight for Blizzard (season restrictions still apply)

variables.name: Seg0
variables.description: Map is divided into 3 segments, objects that need to spawmn reasonabiliy far are put in Seg0 like houses.

variables.name: Seg1
variables.description: Broken cars and other similar objects are put in Seg1.

variables.name: Seg2
variables.description: Spawn distance performance segment.
